## reference · ux gestalt proximity grouping whitespace
* Objects near each other tend to be grouped together.
* Proximity establishes relationships between nearby objects.
* Elements in close proximity are perceived to share similar functionality or traits.
* Proximity helps users understand and organize information faster and more efficiently.
* Use sufficient whitespace to effectively group related information.
* Avoid clutter to prevent users from misinterpreting relationships between elements.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/law-of-proximity/
